name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Discerning God's Word for a culture in crisis
body:
Discerning God's Word for a culture in crisis
View this email in your browser

My Faith Votes
presents
My Faith Matters LIVE
A Conversation with John
Stonestreet
Date: APR 25TH
Time: 8:00PM (ET) / 5:00PM (PT)

"We've had a worldview shift.
It's not just that we've shifted in our view of what's right and
wrong. We've shifted in our understanding of the entire nature of
reality."
- John Stonestreet, BreakPoint
Radio Co-Host

How do we thrive in a culture
that has become increasingly hostile toward Christianity? Do we
have to lose this generation or the next to this culture that is
in crisis? With a Christian worldview, we have biblical clarity
and the go-to manual to equip ourselves to rise above the
culture.

Join us for an exclusive
conversation with author and speaker John Stonestreet for our
next My Faith Matters LIVE show as we explore a biblically-based
response for a culture in crisis.

John Stonestreet is the President
of the Colson Center for Christian Worldview, a sought-after
speaker on issues of worldview and culture, and co-host of the
nationally distributed daily commentary BreakPoint. His books
include A Practical Guide to Culture (2017), Restoring All Things
(2014), Same-Sex Marriage (2013), and Making Sense of Your World
(2007).

Don't miss the conversation on
Tuesday, April 25th at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT!

My Faith Matters LIVE shows are
streamed live over the Internet at MyFaithVotes.org, or if you
are on the move, sign up for our interactive call and listen on
your phone.

name: Chrissy Harbin
subject: 5 ways to bring state freedom back now
body:
| |
---
| | | | Hi Peter, I trust you made it through another Tax Day intact. It's a relief to know the federal government is done ravishing through your earnings...for now. But we know this feeling won't last long. In fact, the impact of days like Tax Day will only get worse unless we keep fighting to restore free markets, limited government, and individual liberty. President Trump has promised tax reform at the national level, as well as tremendous regulatory reform. He's also pledged to take on the bureaucracies of education, labor, and healthcare. But it can be difficult to understand exactly what needs to happen to make this restoration a reality. I'd like to share a new, free resource designed to equip you with an understanding of the opportunities available at the state level. **__[Returning Free Markets to the States](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5ecf39d94402285943abf7e33761578344f4f1be0266d528002ecdb85f9ee53da885a52776a49daf2d6ac2af31412fe5c55a4c512058c96f17851e0afd1fd392 "Returning Free Markets to the States")__** outlines the five areas our policymakers need to focus on to bring economic freedom back home. We hope this free eBook will equip you with the facts you need for these upcoming battles. Additionally, this will help you discuss these reforms with your fellow citizens. **_[Download the eBook now»](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=5ecf39d9440228594d50859a3a838bae577a0f1e4e5b7fd828d27d1383ff6f78bcab70b420362591e172b105b15f9e13e9b33ed26d66af251549399841f3f432 "Download the eBook now »")_**
---

Chrissy Harbin | Vice President of External Affairs | Americans For Prosperity
1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700, Arlington, VA 22201

Senator Bernie Sanders has said that this moment in time requires "a political revolution which engages millions of Americans from all walks of life."

With Donald Trump in office, that kind of participation is required now more than ever.

We're seeing it at protests and at airports, in special elections, and in record calls to Congress. But Republicans are relentless.

That's why, right now, Bernie is touring "red states" to energize Democrats across the country and take the fight to Republicans right in their backyards.

name: Scott Arceneaux
subject: GREAT news
body:
#
Team --
I wanted to stop in and introduce myself as the newest member of your team working to elect Andrew Gillum for Governor. And already, I'm amazed at what you all have been able to accomplish in less than two months on the campaign trail.
Thousands of people just like you launched this campaign together with the knowledge that we were the underdogs. You knew that Andrew Gillum didn't have a famous name or the ability to write himself a big check -- but because of your dedication and enthusiasm, you believed that this was still possible.
**This morning, the Center for Politics rated this race a toss-up.** In a state where we haven't elected a Democratic governor since 1994 -- over two decades ago -- the experts now believe we're in the running to win, because people like you have stepped up to the plate and demonstrated that you're willing to do what it takes to help us bring it home for Florida.
With your help, this race won't just be a toss-up -- it will be a victory in Florida that will resonate across the country -- and that's why we're asking:
[**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can afford to today to help us keep up the momentum we need to win?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3380/9e00690/49fad6f9/240340f3/281169507/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170420-tossup-full")
The people-powered campaign you helped build has already sent shockwaves across the state and the country in less than two months. I'm excited to see what we'll be able to accomplish together as we work to take back our state and nation over the next year and beyond.
Bring it home,
Scott Arceneaux
Chief Strategist
Andrew Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3380/9e00690/49fad6f9/240340f3/281169507/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170420-tossup-full")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3380/9e00690/49fad6f9/240340f2/281169507/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3380/9e00690/49fad6f9/240340f5/281169507/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). clean_body: Good afternoon Derek, Today Gov. Chris Sununu released his report, “100 Businesses in 100 Days: New Hampshire is Open for Business.” ( ) I encourage you to read it and share it on social media. The Governor has held true to his commitment to meet with 100 businesses in 100 days. In fact, he exceeded his goal by meeting with 127 businesses from seven countries and twenty-three states. I believe Gov. Sununu is paving the way for a more prosperous and economically vibrant Granite State by identifying opportunities and obstacles to economic growth. It’s refreshing to have a chief executive who is focused on our future economy for a change. Heaven knows our previous Governor Maggie Hassan showed little interest in moving our economy forward. Can you do us a favor? Please RETWEET ( ) my tweet on Twitter and SHARE ( ) our latest post on Facebook to echo Governor Sununu's report and to support his initiative! Many thanks, Jeanie Forrester Chairman Share your Robly campaign on Facebook ( ) Share your Robly campaign on Twitter ( ) ( ) ( ) ( ) footer image
